## Conflict prevention checklist
- [ ] I branched from the latest `main` (or rebased onto latest `main`) before opening this PR.
- [ ] I ran `git fetch origin && git rebase origin/main` (or merged `origin/main`) and resolved conflicts locally.
- [ ] `git status` is clean and there are no leftover conflict markers.
- [ ] This PR avoids unrelated file edits (especially shared docs) unless necessary.

## Validation
- [ ] Relevant local checks/tests were executed and results are included.
